text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
CODEBOOK: Medicare Part D Medication Therapy Management Enrollment │ May 2024│ V 1.3 30 

TARG_MED_REV_NUM 

LABEL: Number of targeted medication reviews conducted 

DESCRIPTION: This variable indicates the number of targeted medication reviews conducted 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CMS (HPMS files) 

VALUES: 0–XXX 

COMMENT: CMS created the MTM file from information submitted by Part D plan sponsors to CMS’s Health Plan
